case_title: VLADIMIR NOVIKOU et al VS. STACY TURNER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NOVIKOU, VLADIMIR NOVIKOV, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOVIKOU, VLADIMIR NOVIKOV, DENNIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURNER, STACY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-17-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, STACY
